audit_items.proof_trace: The property asserts all dynamic allocations in main.h are freed on every path, but main.h contains zero dynamic memory allocation calls (no kmalloc, kzalloc, vmalloc, or equivalent). The three identified inline functions (nfp_abm_has_prio, nfp_abm_has_drop, nfp_abm_has_mark) are simple boolean predicates that read struct fields only. The property's universal quantification over an empty set is vacuously satisfied.
